verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Volatile paths remain tmpfs; No durable data in volatile; Documented; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red with the enumeration artifact absent (spec failing), green at HEAD (4/4)
gate_result.tmpfs_evidence: Live /proc/mounts longest-prefix resolution proves every volatile tier-map entry under /run (rustup toolchains, build tmp) is mounted tmpfs on this host; cargo-target is volatile by contract — disk-backed by policy for large builds but reproducible and never durable.
gate_result.separation_evidence: No volatile entry targets the durable lib tier, no durable entry targets /run, and every volatile env var living on /run is intentional (misplaced=false) per the live enumeration — durable data cannot hide in the volatile tier.
gate_result.documentation_evidence: The volatile contract is documented in the ratified isolation spec (section 2 tier table) and the tier map's tiers.volatile definition; the spec asserts both.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Assertions execute against the live host mount table and the live enumeration, not fixtures.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-073 is complete: the volatile tier is confirmed ephemeral — /run-resident volatile paths are live tmpfs mounts, cargo-target is volatile by documented contract, no durable data hides in the volatile tier in either direction, and the contract is documented in the ratified spec and tier map.
